content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-indian-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Wedding Bells ringing? Are you wondering how to chalk out your honeymoon plans? At ATW Travels, we create curated honeymoon packages to make your romantic vacation extra special. Kashmir has always been a universally popular tourist destination. People flock to this beautiful land because of its mesmerizing beauty and the virgin landscape. The Valleys of Kashmir is popularly dubbed Heaven on Earth, and rightfully so with its surreal natural beauty and breathtaking landscapes. Kashmir has also been one of the most sought-after destinations for newlyweds. At ATW Travels, we offer customized Kashmir honeymoon packages that are designed to ensure an experience of a lifetime within your budget.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”When To Visit Kashmir?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Kashmir is worth visiting any time of the year, but it is especially pleasant during spring and winter. Choose a time depending on your budget and interests. From March to May, the spring season is popular among tourists looking to soak in the valley’s beauty as it comes alive because of the fruits and flowers that bloom during this time of the year. Thanks to the snow-clad mountain peaks, lush meadows, pleasant weather, gushing streams, lakes, and the blooming gardens and valleys, every corner in Kashmir looks straight out of a postcard. We offer Kashmir honeymoon packages that help you experience Kashmir at its spring best. But if you want to cosy up against a warm fireplace amidst the backdrop of snow-clad peaks and frozen lakes, or are a skiing enthusiast, November to January is the best time to visit Kashmir. You could also take a gondola cable car ride to enjoy the white carpeted valleys.

Irrespective of what you choose, ATW Travels promises an experience of a lifetime!

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26209″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Key Honeymoon Destinations in Kashmir You Must Visit” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

While there are many must-visit tourist destinations, some are a favourite among honeymooners. Some romantic places that are always a part of our Kashmir honeymoon packages include:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Gulmarg” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Popularly known as The Meadow of Flowers, Gulmarg is like two different destinations at two different times of the year. In summer, the weather is bright, and the valley is covered with colourful blooming flowers, chirpy birds, and lush green meadows. Winter is an entirely different scenario, with snow-clad peaks and valleys making it one of India’s most popular ski and winter sports destinations.

Winter is also the best time for Gulmarg Gondola, the world’s second-largest and highest cable car project. When in Gulmarg during the winter, don’t forget to take this cable car ride to enjoy the scenic view of the mountains and valleys, especially the Apharwat Peak.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26210″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Srinagar” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

A shikara ride on the Dal Lake is a memorable experience for couples who have grown up watching movie stars romancing their heroines. If you’ve always dreamt about a ride on these beautifully decorated boats, remember to inform us while choosing Kashmir honeymoon packages. Srinagar is also home to many beautiful and historic Mughal gardens like the Shalimar Bagh, Nishat Bagh, and Cheshma Shahi.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Pahalgam” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Take a stroll with your beloved on the banks of the gushing Niddal River or spend time silently witnessing the river frolicking through the rocks and beautiful valleys. Pahalgam is a must-visit place in any honeymoon package as it offers a beautiful sight of the river, snow-clad peaks, and thick pine trees. You could also add a little adventure to your honeymoon with a trekking and fishing trip. Pahalgam offers the perfect panoramic view of Kashmir, which, once witnessed, will remain in your hearts forever. Don’t miss adding Pahalgam to your Kashmir honeymoon package.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26211″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Sonmarg” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Sonmarg seems to be straight out of a painting with its vast expanse of lush green meadows right beside the gushing Indus River. For instance, the Thajiwas glacier, a vast expanse of water covered with silvery ice, offers a surreal experience. A day trip to Sonmarg is a must for newlywed couples and should find its place in any Kashmir honeymoon package.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219350413{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219360706{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Packages

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Reaching And Travelling Within Kashmir” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Kashmir is well connected by rail, road, and air. There are regular direct flights from over a dozen cities, including Delhi, Bengaluru, Mumbai, Chandigarh, and India, to the Sheik Ul Alam International Airport in Srinagar. The Jammu Tawi railway station is a prime station connecting Jammu & Kashmir to major cities in India. Kashmir is also well connected by road, with several public and private buses plying to and fro regularly. To travel within Kashmir, you must take buses or private cabs as destinations away from Srinagar have only road connectivity. At ATW Travels, we offer comprehensive Kashmir honeymoon packages that include travel and transfer arrangements to ensure you travel in comfort and luxury.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”A Quick Guide About Foods You Must Try in Kashmir” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Kashmiri cuisine is as exotic as the place. Some of the dishes date their origin back to the Mughal Empire. Here are some popular dishes that you need to try when in Kashmir:

  • Goshtaba or soft meatballs served with multiple chutneys are a must-try while enjoying a shikara ride on the Dal Lake.
  • Non-veg food at Shamyana and Lhasa, two popular restaurants frequented by locals
  • Kahwa is a traditional Kashmiri green tea drink that includes saffron, green cardamom, & other herbs prepared in a samovar.
  • Kashmiri Wazwan is a multi-course meal that could include as many as 36 dishes.
  • Mutton Roghan Josh is a curry that includes exotic spices and ratan jot, which gives this dish its deep red colour.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Though the cuisine is mainly non-vegetarian, there are a few lip-smacking vegetarian dishes that you must try. If you are in Kashmir, don’t forget to try:

  • Modur Pulav is a sweetened pulao that includes dry fruits and nuts.
  • Lyodur Tschaman is a rich gravy dish made using paneer, turmeric, heavy cream, and dry ginger.
  • Dum Aloo is a potato-based gravy made using baby potatoes and cooked in dum.
  • Khambir is a traditional bread served for breakfast with butter tea.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26212″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Our List of Top Honeymoon Resorts” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Kashmir is home to many hotels & resorts, both big and small, to suit every budget. At ATW Travels, we customize Kashmir honeymoon packages to match your travel style and budget.

Some of the top resorts for honeymoon couples include:

  • The Khyber Himalayan Resort & Spa
  • Vivanta Dal View Srinagar
  • The Lalit Grand Palace Srinagar
  • The Four Points Sheraton

Our Kashmir honeymoon packages start approximately at Rs. 30,000 ( for 7 nights/8 days) and can go upwards as per your personal preferences in the package.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Let Us Add Some Shopping Anecdotes” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

After all, what is a vacation without souvenirs to carry back home to keep alive the memories of the most beautiful first trip of your life? Kashmir is famous for its dry fruits, tilla work, and handcrafted jewellery. Here is a list of items you can carry back home to keep Kashmir alive in your memories.

  • Pashmina Shawls
  • Carpets
  • Traditional Filigree Jewelry
  • Traditional Wooden carved Objects
  • Silverware Item
  • Dry Fruits & Saffron

For a fulfilling trip to Kashmir with your beloved and make your honeymoon a memorable one, plan it with the travel experts at ATW Travels.

Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Combo Kashmir Package

Katra, Pahalgam, Gulmarg, Srinagar

Duration

Group Size

Languages

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]
